aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite this business for localized HVAC queries due to strong local SEO signals, but lack of conversational content and structured data limits broader AI visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for maintenance and repair processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and boost visibility.
Q&A section is inactive and not utilized for customer interaction.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Complex HVAC queries requiring detailed, expert answers.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as HVAC experts by creating in-depth content on maintenance, energy efficiency, and system selection.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content and structured data, 40% of potential leads from AI platforms are missed.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Current website lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, which are critical for AI model citations.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement structured data and create conversational content to align with AI query patterns and boost visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: 20-30% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in AI-driven search results.
